{{Infobox character
| name = Bloodspawn
| aliases = bloodspawn
| appears_in = Cradle
| abilities = suicide attacks
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Bloodspawn Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Bloodspawn are creatures of blood and [[madra]] created by the [[Bleeding Phoenix]]. They arise whenever blood is spilled and leaves the influence of a person's spirit, such as when it is on the skin or in a wound. This process can create a self-sustaining cycle of multiplication, as any new blood spilled by a creature or person can hatch into additional monsters. As the [[Dreadgod]] awakens, these entities are expected to spread across vast regions, potentially turning every drop of blood within a hundred-mile radius into a monster. Physically, bloodspawn are highly varied and lack a single consistent form. They have been described as faceless, shambling creatures, gnarled trees, clouds of gas, jagged crystals, or transparent entities resembling red glass. Some can take on more advanced humanoid shapes, even mimicking the weapons or [[madra]] of those they consume. They are capable of diverse attacks, such as splitting into crimson vines to strangle victims, using striker techniques, or manifesting mouths and teeth to bite prey. While some are slow-moving, others can be quite fast or capable of slithering through tight spaces. They function as puppets of the [[Phoenix]], often hunting resistance or feeding on [[madra]] to either evolve or return power to the [[Dreadgod]].}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Originating from a [[Dreadgod]], these [[madra]]-composed creatures hatch from blood as part of the [[Phoenix]]'s power when a [[Dreadgod]] wakes. They can be created from human injuries and are capable of ruining entire towns, having previously ravaged the homes of Arelius. While some possess bodies with wooden skeletons, these entities can slither through gaps in webs or form suddenly in midair. Upon being approached or dying, they perform suicide attacks by exploding into scarlet leaves, crimson vines, or thorns. As their numbers increased overhead, hundreds gathered at ground level before they eventually vanished once the red aura withdrew.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|bloodspawn can be created from human injuries.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|some bloodspawn have bodies that appear to have a skeleton of wood underneath.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|certain bloodspawn explode into branches of crimson vines covered in scarlet leaves.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|There are hundreds of bloodspawn at ground level.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bloodspawn]] can ruin towns.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bloodspawn]] are part of the [[Phoenix]]'s power and hatch from blood when the [[Dreadgod]] wakes.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The bloodspawn originated from a [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bloodspawn]] have ravaged Arelius homes.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|a pair of bloodspawn formed beneath him in midair.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bloodspawn]] are composed of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bloodspawn]] can burst into thorns when approached.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bloodspawn]] can perform suicide attacks.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|A bloodspawn slammed on the door.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bloodspawn]] are creatures that explode upon death.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17">''Skysworn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bloodspawn]] are appearing overhead in increasing numbers.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bloodspawn]] are creatures that can slither through gaps in webs.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bloodspawn]] vanished once the red aura withdrew.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] and [[Renfei]] fought against the bloodspawn.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Bloodspawn are malicious, hungry creatures that emerge from bandages or wherever blood drips and leaves red trails upon the ground. These entities can manifest in various forms, appearing as humans wielding swords or possessing limbs made of flourishing tree branches. During the events on the cloudship, these creatures rose to tear apart refugees before being eliminated by [[Orthos]]. While they are dangerous, the bloodspawn can be torn down to their [[essence]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Bloodspawn]] can tear apart refugees.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Bloodspawn]] rise wherever blood drips from the ground.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Bloodspawn]] are creatures that can emerge from bandages.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Bloodspawn]] had risen on the cloudship.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Bloodspawn]] are creatures that rise from red trails.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Bloodspawn]] are creatures characterized by malicious hunger.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Bloodspawn]] can be shaped like humans with swords.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Some bloodspawn have flourishing tree branches for limbs.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Bloodspawn]] are creatures that can be torn to [[essence]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] eliminates bloodspawn.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Bloodspawn]] are creatures that grow from blood and eat [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Bloodspawn]] are described as crawling over a mountain like ants.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Bloodspawn]] roam in packs and hunt resistance.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|But Lindon said, "I assumed so, but there are hundreds of bloodspawn at ground level."<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“Bunch of bloodspawn crawling over a mountain, like ants.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
